findings.summary: Assumed user runs dangerouslySkipPermissions everywhere, built on false premise, had to undo settings.json hard-block
findings.evidence: User showed screenshot of permission prompt, then reversed settings.json decision
findings.proposed_fix: Ask for specific file list before implementing protection changes

findings.summary: Made settings.json exit 2 based on ambiguous confirmation, then undid it when user clarified
findings.proposed_fix: Enumerate candidates and confirm before acting on category-level requests
